headlines.title: Republicans cancel votes amid GOP fight over Trump’s ‘anti-weaponization’ fund
headlines.description: Objections to President Donald Trump’s controversial “anti-weaponization” fund prompted Senate Republicans to postpone votes to fund ICE and Border Patrol until June.

headlines.title: DNC releases long-delayed 2024 autopsy, despite party frustrations with its findings
headlines.description: Democratic National Committee Chair Ken Martin on Thursday released the party’s autopsy report on the 2024 election after facing intense pressure to do so

headlines.title: The biggest lesson from Trump’s retribution campaign: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, Jonathan Allen shares his top takeaway from President Donald Trump’s efforts this month to unseat fellow Republicans.

headlines.title: Suicides rise in ICE detention, 911 calls detail serious cases of self-harm
headlines.description: Suicides rise in ICE detention, 911 calls detail serious cases of self-harm

headlines.title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani is launching a chat show on Twitch
headlines.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani plans to launch a livestream series called “Talk with the People”

headlines.title: NY congressional candidate on running against AI money and Jack Schlossberg
headlines.description: New York State Assemblyman Alex Bores (D) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss AI regulation and the role of technology in his Congressional primary race.

headlines.title: Keisha Lance Bottoms says Trump’s ‘chaos’ is a part of her campaign for governor
headlines.description: Georgia gubernatorial candidate Keisha Lance Bottoms (D) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss her primary win and what her strategy will be going forward ahead of the general election in November.

headlines.title: ‘A complete and total failure’: Calls grow for DNC chair Ken Martin to resign over 2024 autopsy
headlines.description: Ashley Etienne, Dan Merica and Sarah Chamberlain join the Meet the Press NOW roundtable as Democratic National Committee chair Ken Martin faces backlash after releasing the report on former Vice President Harris’ 2024 election loss. NBC News’ Natasha Korecki explains how the long-awaited report came after intense pressure from Democrats.

headlines.title: Absence of USAID likely slowed Ebola detection and response, former officials say
headlines.description: The Trump administration hollowed out USAID last year, but the State Department denied the changes have hampered its response.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Trump abruptly scraps signing of landmark executive order regulating AI
headlines.description: President Donald Trump scrapped an executive order signing Thursday. The order is expected to lay out partnerships with leading AI companies to vet new models.

headlines.title: Former Detroit Mayor Mike Duggan ends independent bid for Michigan governor
headlines.description: Former Detroit Mayor Mike Duggan on Thursday ended his independent campaign for governor in Michigan, citing national headwinds that are boosting Democrats.“If we were even in the polls and behind in fundraising, we have a path to winning.
